seoTitle: How to Get QuickBooks Desktop (Official Download Guide)
metaDescription: Purchase, download, and activate QuickBooks Desktop through the official Intuit Account Portal, including license setup.
intro: Getting a legitimate copy of QuickBooks Desktop starts and ends with the official Intuit Account Portal, avoiding unauthorized resellers along the way. This guide covers selecting your subscription tier, downloading the installer, and activating your license correctly. It's for anyone setting up QuickBooks Desktop for the first time or on a replacement machine.

steps.heading: Log into the Intuit Account Portal
steps.body: Go to the official Customer Account Management Portal and sign in with your Intuit subscription credentials.

steps.heading: Select your product edition
steps.body: Choose your specific licensed edition, such as QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise, from the central products matrix.

steps.heading: Download the installer
steps.body: Click the Download button to pull the correct 32-bit or 64-bit standalone executable file.

steps.heading: Run the setup wizard
steps.body: Right-click to run the installer as administrator and choose Express Install for a standard setup, or Custom and Network Options for a shared server install.

steps.heading: Activate and update
steps.body: Enter your product serial and license key, allow the upgrade assistant to convert any older company files, then launch QuickBooks and install the latest updates.

faq.question: Is QuickBooks Desktop still available to purchase?
faq.answer: Yes, though Intuit continues to push its cloud offerings, Desktop editions remain available through the official account portal for existing license holders.

faq.question: What system requirements should I check first?
faq.answer: Confirm your machine meets the required Windows framework and RAM specs listed on the Intuit portal before starting the installer.

faq.question: Can I move my company file from an older version?
faq.answer: Yes, the built-in upgrade assistant can automatically convert older company data files during setup.

faq.question: What if I lose my license key?
faq.answer: Your license and product numbers are stored in your Intuit account portal, so you can retrieve them there instead of digging through old emails.
